data.name: Hero's Journey
data.detailed_description:
※遊戲中的所有人物都超過18歲
※所有的H场景都是针对M！

T拿下性感、卑鄙的魔女!


基於命令的戰鬥RPG遊戲，你要與性感的女巫戰鬥!
包括2個劇集!

EPISODE0: 與魔女Dealer的戰鬥

EPISODE1: 與他的妹妹Alice在湖邊決鬥

你可以從你喜歡的任何一集開始播放! 你可以在任何時候切換!

EPISODE0:打敗邪惡的魔女!


打倒卑鄙的魔女Dealer!

操作說明:

轉入下一個: 空格鍵
跳過場景: ESC
全屏: F11

EPISODE1:毆打你那時髦的妹妹!


你被你的妹妹Alice挑戰了，要進行決鬥!
你必須獲勝，維護你作為兄長的尊嚴!

操作說明:

移動: WASD
轉到下一個: 空格鍵
跳過場景: ESC
打開,調查: E
全屏: F11
自動對話轉發: 在場景中按左上角的A按鈕
更換衣服: 在場景中按下左上角的服裝按鈕

從善良的阿姨Herba購買物品!


在善良的Herba阿姨的商店購買設備，並擊敗Alice!

配有脫衣系統!


讓我們脫下角色的服裝，盡情享受吧! 只有EPISODE1

當你輸給一個恃強凌弱的女人時...


如果你輸給了一個恃強凌弱的女人，必然會有可怕的後果!
※所有的H场景都是针对M！

data.short_description: 在基於命令的RPG戰鬥中，打倒性感、卑鄙的魔女! ※所有的H场景都是针对M！
data.supported_languages:
英文, 簡體中文, 日文*, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-2100, AMD FX-6300
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760, AMD Radeon HD 7950
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-2500K or AMD Ryzen 5 1400
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060, AMD Radeon RX 580 or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間

data.name: Hero's Journey
data.detailed_description:
※All characters in the game are at least 18 years old
※All H-scenes are femdom only!

Take down Sexy, Mean witches!


Command-based Combat RPG game where you fight a sexy witch!
2 episodes included!

EPISODE0: Combat with Dealer the witch

EPISODE1: Duel with his younger sister Alice at the lake

You can play from whichever episode you prefer! You can switch at any time!

EPISODE0:Defeat the Wicked Witch!


Take down the mean witch Dealer!

How to play:

Go to next: Space
Skip scene: ESC
Switch screen mode: F11

EPISODE1:Beat up your sassy younger sister!


You are challenged to a duel by your younger sister Alice!
You must win and preserve your dignity as a older brother!

How to play:

Move: WASD
Go to next: Space
Skip Scenes: ESC
Open,investigate: E
Switch screen mode: F11
Automatic dialogue forwarding: Press the A button in the upper left corner during a cut scene
Cast Off: Press the costume button in the upper left corner during a cut scene

Buy items from kind aunt Herba!


Buy equipment at kind Aunt Herba's shop and beat Alice!

Cast-off system installed!


Let's take character's costume off and have fun! EPISODE 1 only

When you lose to a bullying woman...


If you lose to a bullying woman, there are bound to be dire consequences!
※All H-scenes are femdom only!

data.supported_languages:
English, Simplified Chinese, Japanese*, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 (64bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i3-2100, AMD FX-6300
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760, AMD Radeon HD 7950
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 (64bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-2500K or AMD Ryzen 5 1400
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060, AMD Radeon RX 580 or higher
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 10 GB available space
